name: sportsync
description: All-in-one sports competition management and live scoring platform

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @sportsync/api -w @sportsync/dashboard -w @sportsync/scorer -w @sportsync/scoreboard -w @sportsync/website
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @sportsync/shared && npm run build -w @sportsync/sport-rules && npm run build -w @sportsync/api-client
scripts.clean:packages: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');for (const p of ['packages/shared','packages/sport-rules','packages/api-client']) { for (const d of ['dist','tsconfig.tsbuildinfo']) { const t=path.join(p,d); if (fs.existsSync(t)) fs.rmSync(t,{recursive:true,force:true}); } }"
scripts.rebuild:packages: npm run clean:packages && npm run build:packages
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
